settings.title: Settings
settings.downloadConcurrencyHint: How many videos to download simultaneously, others will queue
settings.m3u8ConcurrencyHint: How many .ts fragments to download at once for a single M3U8 video
settings.speedLimitHint: 0 means unlimited, limits max speed per thread
settings.autoOpenAfterDownloadHint: Auto action when a single video download completes

globalProxy.title: Global Outbound Proxy
globalProxy.description: Configure global outbound proxy for network requests

settings.languageHint: Preview interface language immediately after switching, takes effect permanently after saving.
settings.themeHint: Choose the appearance theme for the app, takes effect immediately.
settings.launchOnStartupDescription: Automatically run Videor when system starts
settings.silentStartupDescription: Start in background mode without showing main window
settings.minimizeToTrayDescription: When checked, clicking the close button will hide to system tray, otherwise the app will exit directly.
settings.useAppWindowControlsDescription: Use built-in minimize, maximize/restore, and close buttons in the app header.
settings.aboutHint: View version information and update status.
settings.portableMode: Portable mode: updates require manual download.
settings.updateFailed: Update installation failed, attempted to open download page.
settings.checkUpdateFailed: Failed to check for updates, please try again later.
settings.restartRequiredMessage: Modifying the Videor configuration directory requires restarting the application to take effect. Restart now?
settings.restartFailed: Application restart failed, please manually close and reopen.
settings.devModeRestartHint: Dev Mode: Automatic restart not supported, please manually restart the application.

globalProxy.hint: Configure a global outbound proxy for network requests. Leave empty for direct connection.

settings.batchParseIntervalHint: Wait time between parses during batch download (ms)
settings.downloadDirReset: Reset to system default download directory
settings.downloadDirectoryDescription: Default save location for video downloads
settings.portableUpdateHint: Portable mode: updates require manual download.

download.urlPlaceholder: Paste video link, press Enter to start download...
download.emptyHint: Parse a video to start downloading
download.noFilterResultHint: Try adjusting search terms or filters
download.selectVideos: Please select at least one video
download.allDownloading: All selected videos are already downloading
download.clearBlocked: Cannot clear history while downloads are in progress

video.parsingFailed: Parsing failed, please check the link
video.alreadyInHistory: This video is already in history

placeholders.douyin: Paste Douyin video link, press Enter to parse...
placeholders.bilibili: Paste Bilibili video or collection link...
placeholders.m3u8: Paste webpage or M3U8 playlist link, press Enter to parse...
placeholders.other: Paste video link, press Enter to parse...

bilibili.loginDescription: Login credentials are stored locally only, used to access content your account has permission to view.
bilibili.needLoginHint: This content requires login to verify account permissions.
bilibili.batchStarted: Started batch parsing {{count}} Bilibili videos, saved to collection folder{{suffix}}

updateBanner.title: New version {{version}} available
updateBanner.downloadFailed: Update download failed, please try again later
